// This package MUST NOT COMPILE.
//
// Proof for the transport requirement: the wire boundary accepts only the
// summary form. If a LocalClassification could be published, the two-type split
// in the classification contract would be decoration.
package badtransport

import (
	"context"

	"github.com/lucianoengel/openshield/internal/core"
	corev1 "github.com/lucianoengel/openshield/internal/core/corev1"
)

func leak(t core.Transport, lc *corev1.LocalClassification) error {
	// LocalClassification holds matched content. There is no method that
	// accepts it, so this cannot compile.
	return t.PublishClassification(context.Background(), lc)
}
